{skill_fallback_guide} Before running the iteration, READ `references/iteration.md` (resolve via the same documented fallback order as SKILL.md). It contains the iteration-strategy protocol for `{strategy}` — what artifacts to consult, what to surface, what to update, and what NOT to touch. Iteration work that hasn't loaded that reference will miss strategy-specific contracts (the {strategy} strategy has a different probe pattern than the other three; see references/iteration.md for the canonical specification).

Then run the next iteration using the {strategy} strategy. Any updates to quality/PROGRESS.md must keep the existing phase tracker in checkbox format (`- [x] Phase N - <name>`) — do not rewrite it as a table. The orchestrator appends `## Iteration: <strategy> started/complete` sections itself; iteration work should not touch the existing phase tracker lines.
